generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VisualDataTransmitted
]

instance VedderESCSensing : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for vehicle state data (speed and steering angle)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation component for converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation component"
]

instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis for steering and speed control"
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer"
]

instance RemoteManagementUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface for remote ACC control"
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance VisualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VedderESCSensing
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VisualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual data from depth camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VisualDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, Python38, ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus, ROS2Middleware, Python38, SQLDatabase
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered point cloud data from DBSCAN processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data after Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus, ROS2Middleware, Python38, SQLDatabase
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering for LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCControlAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control algorithm for lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlus
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for development and deployment on Jetson devices"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring, ComputationOffloading, RemoteManagement, ThreeDVisualization, ReportGeneration
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware for inter-node communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring, ComputationOffloading, RemoteManagement, ThreeDVisualization, ReportGeneration
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoring, ThreeDVisualization, ReportGeneration
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloading
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloading
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storage of object tracks and vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGeneration
]

instance DataMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state visualization service"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloading : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagement : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote ACC control via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service for object tracks and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight, DrivingPathVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human-readable timeseries reports service"
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeseriesReportsInsight
]

instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state (speed, steering angle)"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks"
]

instance DrivingPathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of projected driving path"
]

instance TimeseriesReportsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable timeseries reports of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic ACC control action for speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual remote control action for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle hardware"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderESCSensing, MotorActuation, SteeringServoActuation, LowerLevelChassis, UpperLevelChassis, NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity"
    base:contains DataMonitoring, ComputationOffloading, ThreeDVisualization, ReportGeneration, DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlAlgorithm, NVIDIAJetpack50SDK, ROS2Middleware, Python38, CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink, SQLDatabase
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity on external systems"
    base:contains RemoteManagementUI, RemoteManagement
]

instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking, enable/disable ACC) from the Controlling FE to the Motor Actuation and Steering Servo Actuation components for vehicle actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency maintained at ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity (per R7), with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across components (per R8), as required for real-time safety-critical operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Distributed architecture with Physical Twin Entity (vehicle hardware), Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity connected via ROS2 for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi with OPC UA for inter-entity data translation, as specified in the ISO 23247 Data Translation FE."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during both development (for troubleshooting via data collection and monitoring) and operational phases (for real-time monitoring and remote management of ACC by operators), as users include developers and operators with distinct roles."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC functionality implemented per ISO 15622 Section 6.1–6.2 for Performance Class I (no road curvature capabilities), with remaining requirements omitted due to 1/10-scale vehicle constraints; no explicit uncertainty or error validation mechanisms detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication between components, and Wi-Fi network using OPC Unified Architecture (IEC 62541) for inter-entity data translation between Physical Twin Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano hardware; Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage hosted on external cloud/server with SQL database; User Entity UI deployed on separate client machines."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework reference architecture for system design, and ISO 15622 for ACC control functionality specifications."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with strict latency (≤100 ms) and clock synchronization (100 ms) requirements; no specific cybersecurity protocols or accident mitigation measures detailed for remote operations."
]
